summary: Verified hero readability bug fix on Homepage (/). Subtitle paragraph now renders in full white (rgb(255,255,255)) with textShadow 0px 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.7) and is clearly readable against the darker overlay/background image. Hero heading is also full white with textShadow 0px 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.6) and the 'Connecting' span is in Qatar Maroon rgb(138,21,56) = #8A1538. Homepage loads with 0 console errors/warnings. Stats row renders correctly on both desktop (6-col) and mobile (2-col) with all expected labels (ANNUAL TURNOVER, ANNUAL TRADE VOLUME, CHARTERED ANNUALLY, TRADED GLOBALLY, COUNTRIES SERVED, IN 3 COUNTRIES) and values (e.g. 250M+ USD, 22+ DESTINATION, 3 OFFICES & STAFF IN 3 COUNTRIES). Visual verification confirmed via desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) screenshots.
test_credentials: N/A - public homepage, no auth needed
